title: Crispy Saudia Kebab Skewers
description: A festive saudi arabian dish featuring corned beef on crispy skewers for a tangy and festive treat that is halal-friendly.
instructions: In a shallow bowl, combine corned beef with lemon juice, olive oil, paprika, cayenne pepper, and salt. Marinate for at least 2 hours.
Preheat grill to medium-high heat (around 375°F or 190°C).
On skewers, alternate pieces of marinated corned beef with slices of fresh parsley.
Grill skewers until nicely charred and beef is cooked through, about 8-12 minutes per side. Watch for doneness as marinade can affect cooking time slightly.
Once done, remove from grill and place lemon wedges on top for a burst of freshness.
